REFERENCE: This reference has multiple serious issues suggesting it is fabricated or significantly altered: (1) The title contains multiple deliberate misspellings ('Randomiezd', 'Surgfry', 'LeftgDiaphragmatic', 'Hergia'). (2) The journal is listed as BMJ, but the DOI prefix indicates NEJM (10.1056 is NEJM's prefix). (3) The actual TOTAL trial ('A Randomized Trial of Fetal Surgery for Severe Left Diaphragmatic Hernia') was published in NEJM by Peralta CFA et al., not BMJ by Fortner R. (4) The DOI format '10.1056/bmj-2021-068302' is inconsistent - mixing NEJM's prefix with BMJ reference. (5) The author 'Fortner R' does not match the known authors of the TOTAL trial (which is led by Michael Harrison, Francisco Peralta, and others). This appears to be a fabricated or AI-generated reference with deliberate errors mixed with some real elements.
